channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The First Trailer for ‘Widow’s Bay’ Welcomes You to a Creepy Horror Comedy
item.description: Matthew Rhys ('The Americans') stars as the exasperated mayor of a cursed island in the new series, arriving April 29.

item.title: Samsung announces 2026 Frame TVs and the Pro cost less than last year’s
item.description: Samsung has announced some more details about The Frame and Frame Pro, and the most interesting news is that this year's Frame Pro will be a little less expensive across sizes. While last year's Frame Pro at release was $2,199 for the 65-inch model, $3,199 for the 75-inch, and $4,299 for the 85-inch, the 2026 […]

item.title: The boring, insidious world of the womanosphere
item.description: Usha Vance has a new podcast: Storytime with the Second Lady. It's exactly what it sounds like. Each episode begins with a brief introduction, after which JD Vance's wife reads a children's story. The first three episodes were released Monday, and none is longer than 11 minutes - children's books are, after all, quite short. […]

item.title: Asus just revealed big ROG gaming laptop price hikes — and they're so painful some thought they were an April Fool
item.description: Asus has announced pricing for ROG Zephyrus G16 gaming laptops — and they've been painfully hiked.

item.title: Samsung's new Frame Pro and OLED TVs are now available to order
item.description: After sharing pricing and availability for its new Mini LED TVs in March, Samsung is ready to detail some of the other TVs it introduced at CES earlier this year. The 2026 versions of Samsung's The Frame Pro and OLED TVs are both available to order today – save for some notable exceptions – and they start for as little as $1,200.The Frame Pro was originally introduced in 2025 as the more premium version of Samsung's popular The Frame art TVs. The big advantage of stepping up to a Pro model over a normal Frame is you get a Neo QLED panel with better backlighting, and support for Samsung's Wirel...

item.title: Flipboard's 'social websites' are a new spin on decentralized social media
item.description: Flipboard has been one of the biggest boosters of decentralized social media. Now, the company, which is known for its social news reading app, is rolling out its latest experiment, "social websites." The project offers publishers and creators an easier path into what's often called the "open social web," which includes the fediverse, as well as other protocol-based platforms like Blueksy. The company says it could also help creators of all stripes wrest back control of their audiences from mainstream social media platforms and other "walled gardens."In practice, social websites are essentiall...

item.title: Artemis II crew is like just like us, needs help with Microsoft Outlook issues
item.description: The four history-making Artemis II crew members are cooped up with each other in a tiny space for 10 days. And yet the most uncomfortable aspect of the mission might be having to deal with not one, but two instances of Microsoft Outlook. Commander Reid Wiseman sent a literal "Houston, we have a problem" message to mission control in the early hours of Thursday. He sought tech support for internet connectivity issues on a PCD (personal computing device), which is a Microsoft Surface Pro. Before you ask, yes, Wiseman did try turning the device off and on again before requesting help, but that di...

item.title: Honor 600 Lite : un smartphone milieu de gamme avec une batterie digne des plus grands ?
item.description: Le Honor 600 Lite, dernier modèle de la marque est disponible depuis le 1er avril 2026. Ce smartphone milieu de gamme embarque un châssis en métal, un bouton IA et une batterie de 6520 mAh.

item.title: What the New Starbucks ‘Widely Recyclable’ Label Really Means
item.description: Trash. It's still trash.

item.title: Google Chrome va vous paraître plus rapide, grâce à cette nouveauté
item.description: Les navigateurs basés sur Chromium vont bientôt gagner en vitesse apparente. En effet, les développeurs ont étendu le « lazy loading » aux médias audio et vidéo, de quoi fluidifier le chargement des pages trop lourdes.

item.title: United’s mobile app now shows TSA wait times at select airports
item.description: The TSA wait times feature is one of many new additions to the United app, including automatic rebooking assistance and real-time time weather radar maps.

item.title: 5 popular OpenClaw integrations that will level up your productivity
item.description: A practical look at five of the most popular OpenClaw integrations, covering messaging, productivity, developer tools, and smart home control.

item.title: Marshall Bromley 450 : la version réduite de l’excellente enceinte de soirée Bromley 750 chute déjà sous les 600 €
item.description: Après avoir brillé avec sa Bromley 750, Marshall revient sur le devant de la scène avec une Bromley 450, une version réduite de son enceinte de soirée phare. Un nouveau modèle que l'on trouve déjà en promotion chez Boulanger : il y est affiché à 584,99 euros au lieu de 649,99 euros.

item.title: 'By replacing a legitimate update with a malicious one, they turned the product’s update flow into a malware distribution channel': Experts find flaw in TrueConf video conferencing tool used by governments, military
item.description: Sophisticated cyber-espionage campaign recently uncovered targeting government entities in Southeast Asia.

item.title: Windows 11 : jaloux de Chrome, Microsoft Edge pourrait bientôt plomber votre PC
item.description: Microsoft planche sur une nouvelle option qui permettrait à son navigateur Web Edge de s’ouvrir automatiquement au démarrage de votre PC. Une fonction sur laquelle Google travaille depuis plusieurs mois avec Chrome.

item.title: Netflix has released the first trailer for its next animated movie Swapped — but, even with Michael B. Jordan's star power, I can't see it being the next KPop Demon Hunters
item.description: Set for release on May 1, Swapped is a family-friendly Netflix film whose primary cast includes Michael B. Jordan and Juno Temple.

item.title: Le français OVHCloud veut héberger les données estampillées secret défense des armées européennes
item.description: OVHCloud a annoncé « accélérer ses activités dans la Défense en Europe ». Dans ce secteur, « l'Europe ne peut plus se permettre de dépendre de technologies extra-européennes », estime Octave Klaba, fondateur du champion français du cloud.

item.title: Calls to Regulate Smart Glasses Are Officially Deafening
item.description: Potential plans to add facial recognition to Meta's Ray-Ban smart glasses aren't very popular it seems.

item.title: Tesla’s cheaper vehicles aren’t helping its declining sales
item.description: The company's deliveries in the first quarter were just 6% higher than last year, and Tesla now faces a third straight year of falling sales.

item.title: Commonwealth Fusion Systems leans on magnets for near-term revenue
item.description: Realta Fusion is buying magnets from Commonwealth Fusion Systems, providing a revenue stop gap.

item.title: The pilot phase is over. Here’s what’s next for enterprise AI automation
item.description: Enterprise AI moves beyond pilots toward scalable, orchestrated automation.

item.title: 200 utilisateurs piégés : Meta alerte sur les dangers d’une fausse version de WhatsApp
item.description: Une fausse version de WhatsApp créée par une société italienne spécialisée dans la surveillance aurait réussi à piéger 200 personnes. Une version pirate aujourd’hui désactivée destinée à espionner ses victimes.

item.title: La « boîte de réception IA » débarque dans Gmail, si vous y mettez le prix
item.description: Google déploie son « AI Inbox » dans la messagerie Gmail. Mais tout le monde ne peut pas y avoir accès, loin de là.

item.title: 'Switch to MAX, by any means necessary' — Inside Russia’s great internet crackdown
item.description: After censoring the internet for years, the Kremlin is now pushing citizens to the state-controlled MAX by further targeting VPN usage. But the disconnect over the Telegram shutdown could be the needed turning point.

item.title: Tesla’s sales recover slightly, but the trend lines are all bad
item.description: Tesla's first quarter sales report is out, and depending on how you look at it, the numbers are good but also bad. The company's sales are up a modest 6 percent year over year, but that's probably not the best way of looking at it considering the extraordinary circumstances surrounding Tesla - Elon Musk's Nazi […]

item.title: Linux : Ubuntu augmente (beaucoup) la quantité de RAM minimum recommandée
item.description: Si vous comptiez installer la prochaine version d'Ubuntu sur un vieux PC un peu poussif, il va falloir vérifier sa fiche technique. Pour la première fois depuis longtemps, Linux augmente officiellement ses exigences en mémoire vive.

item.title: AI & cost of legacy systems in UK banking
item.description: UK banks spend ~£3.3bn/year just maintaining legacy core systems, and AI is exposing the cracks.

item.title: AI hype and the quality hangover
item.description: As AI accelerates software development, quality assurance must evolve to prevent instability and costly outages.

item.title: ‘Maul: Shadow Lord’ Will Return for Season 2
item.description: Unsurprisingly, the 'Star Wars' villain known for things that come in twos—his lightsaber, separate halves of his own body—will be back for more.

item.title: A jury says Meta and Google hurt a kid. What now?
item.description: Today on Decoder, we’re talking about the landmark social media addiction trials that just resulted in two major verdicts against Big Tech. There’s one case in New Mexico against Meta, and another in California against both companies, which have said they plan to appeal. These are complicated cases with some huge repercussions for both how […]

item.title: Indie Pass is a new subscription service just for indie games
item.description: Indie.io, which offers a platform to help independent game developers publish their titles, is launching a new subscription service called Indie Pass. The service will cost $6.99 per month and have more than 70 titles, including indie.io's Echoes of the Plum Grove and games from the Fire Emblem-like Dark Deity series. Indie Pass launches on […]

item.title: Microsoft’s new ‘superintelligence’ game plan is all about business
item.description: Mustafa Suleyman has been preparing for his new job description for a long time. Suleyman is Microsoft's inaugural CEO of AI, but after the company underwent a large-scale restructuring in mid-March, he's handed off some duties and shifted focus to chasing superintelligence. Though the news was only made public last month, he tells The Verge, […]

item.title: Google has doubled its storage allowance for its AI Pro plan, and it’s just one-upped ChatGPT — here’s how they compare
item.description: Google's AI Pro subscription tier has had a storage boost, taking its allowance from 2TB to 5TB.

item.title: Sony Xperia 1 VIII : cette fuite dévoile le design étrange d’un smartphone en perdition
item.description: À quoi ressemblera le nouveau Xperia 1 VIII ? Une première fournée de visuels publiés sur Weibo nous met sur la piste d'un appareil aux lignes passablement démodées... mais faut-il vraiment prendre cette première fuite au sérieux ?

item.title: Major clearance sale drops the Samsung Galaxy Buds 3 to just £59
item.description: You can grab yourself a pair of Samsung Galaxy Buds 3 at Three for just £59 when you use this limited-time code.

item.title: Why hands-on digital skills will define the value of AI
item.description: AI is transforming work, but a widening skills gap threatens organizations' ability to keep up.

item.title: Diverse teams start with diverse VCs
item.description: It is the path of least resistance for a growth-stage company to hire from the familiar Silicon Valley pipelines but if a founder wants a diverse team, that value has to be put into practice from the very first hire.

item.title: Windows 11 : la barre des tâches déplaçable tant attendue se dévoile en vidéo
item.description: Promise par Microsoft dans sa volonté d'améliorer Windows 11 en tenant compte des envies des utilisateurs, la barre des tâches déplaçable est en cours de test.

item.title: This even smaller credit card-sized e-reader has one tragic flaw
item.description: There’s a new smallest e-reader in my life. The Xteink X3 is even smaller and thinner than Xteink’s X4 while also improving on the X4 with refined (but still far from great) software, simplified buttons, and an improved magnetic mount on the back. It’s a better compact e-reader than the X4 if extreme portability is […]

item.title: The hottest EVs from the 2026 New York Auto Show (plus one brawny concept)
item.description: With gas prices rising across the country, consumers are turning to electric vehicles as a way to save money on their commute. And while there weren’t a ton of all-new EVs on display at the 2026 New York International Auto Show, we did see some notable debuts from automakers including Subaru, Kia, Hyundai and more. So here’s a look at some of the most interesting upcoming EV models on display today, including a handful of previously announced vehicles that we haven’t had a chance to see in person before. Subaru GetawaySadly, Toyota didn't bring the Highlander EV to the NY Auto Show, so I could...

item.title: Apple Arcade just got two indie gems
item.description:
Two fantastic indie titles just dropped for Apple Arcade. The platform has received versions of Dredge and Unpacking, both of which have been optimized for mobile devices.
Dredge+ is the complete edition of the game, with all released DLC content. This is pretty much a perfect video game that combines fishing with bone-chilling horror. During the day, you sail around and fish, which involves a fishing minigame and a "pack the fish in the bag" minigame. At night, you are hunted by Lovecraftian monsters that may or may not be real. The developers threw in some tricks to make players doubt their...

item.title: Google Home’s latest update makes Gemini better at understanding your commands
item.description: Google is launching another update to its Home app, which is supposed to make controlling your smart home with its Gemini AI assistant "more natural and reliable," according to this week's release notes. With the update, you can describe the type of lighting you want, such as "the color of the ocean," and Gemini will […]

item.title: United adds TSA wait times to its mobile app
item.description: If you're flying United Airlines, you'll now have a better idea of when you need to get to the airport to make your flight. Yesterday the airline announced several updates to its iOS and Android mobile apps including estimated security wait times at all of United's US hub airports as a result of the ongoing […]

item.title: Cette machine de guerre MSI (RTX 5070 Ti, 32 Go de RAM, écran 240 Hz) voit son prix chuter de 600 €
item.description: Le MSI est un laptop qui peut tout faire du montage aux jeux vidéo sans oublier la bureautique. Par exemple, les gamers pourront stocker de nombreux jeux grâce au téra de stockage de l'appareil. Chez Darty, il est, en ce moment, disponible pour 600 euros de moins.

item.title: Brands are getting more physical
item.description: Why marketers are leading with physical experiences in a digital world. In this first half of 2026, we see that marketers are increasingly channeling the Australian songstress Olivia Newton-John and her 1981 hit that called the world to “get physical.” The big shift we see is that brands are rediscovering the power of the physical experience, the touch, the communal moment, the atmosphere, and the desire for human connection....

item.title: Rising gas prices are good news for EV sales, for now
item.description: It's become an American truism: Once you buy an SUV, there's no going back. And our love affair with pickups has been documented in a million country songs and TV commercials. But a brutal spike in gasoline prices - nipping $4 nationwide for a gallon of unleaded, up from $3 when the bombs first began […]

item.title: Amazon veut s’offrir le réseau satellite utilisé par Apple pour rivaliser avec Starlink
item.description: La guerre de l'internet spatial prend une tournure inattendue. Amazon lorgne très sérieusement sur Globalstar, l'entreprise historique qui permet à vos iPhone de capter des signaux de détresse en pleine pampa. Seul hic pour conclure ce rachat monumental : Apple possède une grosse part du gâteau et ne compte pas se laisser faire.
